channel.title: Comments on: Terrapin Side Project – Monk’s Revenge, Ep. 53
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: TimD
item.dc:creator: TimD
item.description: Just found your site off a Tweet from the Terrapin guys. I LOVED the Monk's Revenge and actually found a couple bottles recently tucked away at a local store. I'm a huge fan of Terrapin, I haven't met one of their beers I didn't like... :-)
item.content:encoded: Just found your site off a Tweet from the Terrapin guys. I LOVED the Monk’s Revenge and actually found a couple bottles recently tucked away at a local store. I’m a huge fan of Terrapin, I haven’t met one of their beers I didn’t like… 🙂

item.title: By: Anthony
item.dc:creator: Anthony
item.content:encoded:
“Got a lot of people trying to get into my man-cave.”
“That doesn’t sound right…don’t say that again.”
LOL!! Great episode. Tried Monk’s Revenge and have to agree it’s a great beer. Now I’ll have to go pick up a RoggenRauchBier. Still some around Athens.

item.title: By: t.b.
item.dc:creator: t.b.
item.description: Awesome stuff guys!!! I went a nd got the rest in the back stock room at our local store! Glad you guys got me too it! Best regards!
item.content:encoded:
Awesome stuff guys!!!
I went a nd got the rest in the back stock room at our local store!
Glad you guys got me too it!
Best regards!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: Where and what time Steve? I love a good scotch ale! Look forward to meeting you!!
item.content:encoded: Where and what time Steve? I love a good scotch ale! Look forward to meeting you!!

item.title: By: Steve
item.dc:creator: Steve
item.description: Thanks for the kind words guys! I'll be in town May 6th. Let's get together. I may have some of Side Project Volume 6--90 Shelling Scotch Ale!
item.content:encoded: Thanks for the kind words guys! I’ll be in town May 6th. Let’s get together. I may have some of Side Project Volume 6–90 Shelling Scotch Ale!

item.title: By: Paul
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description: I liked this beer so much that I bought 3 extra bottles of it to drink and cellar. I might even go out and buy a few more just to keep for special occasions. To bad it's a one time release, some of these are so good, they would sell great year round!
item.content:encoded: I liked this beer so much that I bought 3 extra bottles of it to drink and cellar. I might even go out and buy a few more just to keep for special occasions. To bad it’s a one time release, some of these are so good, they would sell great year round!

item.title: By: Ryan
item.dc:creator: Ryan
item.description:
watching the podcast right now...I am glad to have gotten your view on this beer. I have had it on draft, in the bottle and one cellared away. I am jealous that David has the volumes cellared.
And David is was Volume 2 you were thinking of. lol
I might have another suggestion for you guys tomorrow after I get off work from Taco Mac, the beer is from Stone Brewery.
item.content:encoded:
watching the podcast right now…I am glad to have gotten your view on this beer. I have had it on draft, in the bottle and one cellared away. I am jealous that David has the volumes cellared.

And David is was Volume 2 you were thinking of. lol

I might have another suggestion for you guys tomorrow after I get off work from Taco Mac, the beer is from Stone Brewery.
